title: Stop testing your SAAS manually
summary: KaneAI is an AI-powered testing tool that automates QA by accepting plain-English test descriptions, generating and running tests automatically, and reporting results. It reduces manual testing effort and costs significantly for SaaS deployments.
writeup: This video covers KaneAI, an AI-powered testing tool that automates QA for SaaS deployments by taking plain-English test descriptions, then generating, running, and reporting on tests automatically. It matters because it reduces the manual effort and cost of testing, shifting QA toward AI agents and workflow automation. The concrete takeaways: tests are specified in natural language rather than hand-written, generation and execution run without manual intervention, and the approach uses multi-shot generation to produce the test suite.
